sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ أَحْمَدُ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Ahmed je jutros otišao na novi intervju za posao.
sentences.translationEn: Ahmed went to a new job interview this morning.

sentences.arabic: لَبِسَ قَمِيصًا أَبْيَضَ وَكَانَ يَشْعُرُ بِالْقَلِقِ قَلِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Obukao je bijelu košulju i osjećao se malo nervozno.
sentences.translationEn: He wore a white shirt and felt a bit nervous.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَشَرَحَ مَهَارَاتِهِ لِلْمُدِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Samouvjereno je odgovorio na pitanja i objasnio svoje vještine direktoru.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions confidently and explained his skills to the director.

sentences.arabic: اِبْتَسَمَ الْمُدِيرُ وَقَالَ إِنَّهُ سَيَتَّصِلُ بِهِ قَرِيبًا.
sentences.translation: Direktor se nasmiješio i rekao da će ga uskoro nazvati.
sentences.translationEn: The manager smiled and said he would call him soon.
